post.summary: Register a new parent account

200.description: Account created successfully. OTP sent to email

400.description: Email already exists or validation error

post.summary: Verify registration OTP
Login for Parent, Child, Institution Staff or Platform Admin
post.description:
- Parent/Staff: Use email + password + loginAs = "Parent" or "InstitutionAdmin" or "PlatformAdmin" or "Supervisor".
- Child: Use 6-digit code + loginAs = "Child" (no password)

post.summary: Resend OTP (for registration or forgot password later)
Logout (invalidate all refresh tokens)
Add a new child (Parent only)
post.description:
Returns child details + 6-digit registration code + QR code (base64)
MVP: Only one child per parent allowed

post.summary: Sends password reset instructions (OTP or reset link) to the user's email.
Resets the user's password using OTP or reset token.
Changes the current authenticated user's password.

get.summary:
Returns the profile of the authenticated user.
Parent: returns parent info + active child summary.
Child: returns child info with class and institution.

put.summary:
Registers or updates the device FCM token for push notifications.
Call this after login from the mobile app (Parent / Child).

get.summary: Gets paginated list of adventures for the current InstitutionAdmin
get.description: Supports filtering by status and searching by title.

get.summary: Gets detailed view of an Adventure
get.description:
- InstitutionAdmin: Can view any adventure in their institution with full details.
- Child: Can view only Active adventures assigned to their class. 
  If inactive or not assigned → returns IsAccessible = false with message.

put.summary: Updates an existing Adventure (title, description, voice, etc.)
put.description: Can update basic info and re-generate or upload new description voice.

post.summary: Assigns an existing Adventure to a specific Class (creates WeeklyAdventure)
post.description: This activates the adventure for the selected class starting from the given date.

patch.summary: Changes the status of an Adventure (Active / Inactive)

get.summary:
Gets the class assigned to a specific weekly adventure.
Accessible by InstitutionAdmin and Supervisor.

post.summary:
Generates a story for the adventure using AI.
Story voice is processed in the background.
Admin receives a SignalR notification when voice is ready.

get.summary: Gets the full story details of an Adventure (Intro + All Days + Outro)
get.description:
Used for storytelling experience. Returns text and voice URLs for each part.
InstitutionAdmin can view any adventure.
Child can view only if the adventure is assigned and active.

get.summary: Gets tasks for the logged-in child based on the selected tab/source
Gets the child's current points balance

post.summary: Submit a task for the logged-in child

VoiceFile.description: ملف الصوت (صوت الطفل) - مطلوب لـ VoiceQuestion فقط

EvidenceFile.description: ملف الصورة (دليل المهمة) - مطلوب لـ EvidenceSubmission فقط

Comment.description: اختياري: نص إضافي لو الطفل عايز يضيف تعليق (مثلاً للـ Parent)

get.summary:
Retrieves all weekly adventures assigned to the logged-in child's class,
including progress summary, completion status, and day-by-day tracking.
get.description:
This endpoint returns a list of weekly adventures available to the child,
along with aggregated progress data such as earned points, stars,
completed tasks, and the status of each adventure day (locked, unlocked, completed, or missed).

get.summary:
Retrieves detailed information for a specific weekly adventure,
including all tasks with their lock/unlock status and submission details.
get.description:
This endpoint returns the full structure of a weekly adventure,
including:
- Adventure metadata (title, description, goal, media)
- Tasks ordered by day
- Access control status per task (locked/unlocked/completed)
- Submission status (not submitted, pending, approved, missed)
- Child progress (points, stars, completion state)

get.summary: Gets all tasks for a weekly adventure with lock/unlock status per day

post.summary:
Submit an adventure task
- InstantReward → points immediately
- VoiceQuestion → AI evaluates
- EvidenceSubmission → Supervisor reviews
Create a new class

get.summary: Get classes list
Get class by id

post.summary: Assigns a supervisor to a specific class within the current admin's institution.
post.description:
Rules:
- The supervisor must belong to the same institution as the admin.
- The class must belong to the admin's institution.
- Duplicate assignments are not allowed.

delete.summary: Removes a supervisor from a specific class (UnAssign)
delete.description: The operation performs a soft delete of the supervisor-class assignment.

post.summary:
Enrolls a child to the institution using their registration code.
Child won't be assigned to any class yet.

delete.summary: Removes a child from the institution (and their class if assigned).

post.summary:
Assigns an institution-enrolled child to a specific class.
Child must be enrolled in the institution first.

delete.summary: Removes a child from a class only. Child remains in the institution.

get.summary:
Gets all children enrolled in the institution.
Supports filtering by name and class.

post.summary:
Creates a new platform gift.
Gifts can represent badges, characters, collectibles,
or other purchasable virtual items available for children.

get.summary:
Retrieves all platform gifts with pagination and filtering.
Supports filtering by gift type and gift status.

put.summary:
Updates an existing platform gift.
Allows editing gift information such as name, image,
description, points cost, and gift type.

delete.summary:
Soft deletes a platform gift.
Deleted gifts will no longer appear in available listings.

patch.summary:
Changes the status of a gift.
Used to activate or deactivate gifts displayed to children.

get.summary:
Retrieves all active gifts available for purchase by the child.
Includes gifts the child can unlock using earned points.

post.summary:
Purchases a gift using the child's available points.
Deducts the required points while preserving highest score
for leaderboard ranking calculations.

get.summary:
Retrieves all gifts purchased by the current child.
Includes unlocked badges, characters, and collectibles.
Returns all gifts purchased by the parent's active child.

post.summary:
Creates a new institution and generates an InstitutionAdmin account.
Login credentials are sent to the admin email automatically.

get.summary:
Returns a paginated list of all institutions with summary counts.
Supports search by name, code, city, or country.

put.summary: Updates institution details. Admin account email cannot be changed here.

delete.summary: Soft deletes an institution and locks the associated admin account.

get.summary: Returns full details of a specific institution including supervisor list and classes summary.

Returns the profile of a specific supervisor within an institution,
including their assigned classes and children counts.
Retrieves a paginated list of supervisors.
get.description:
- **PlatformAdmin**: Can view **all** supervisors in the system.
- **InstitutionAdmin**: Can only view supervisors belonging to their own institution.

Supports:
- Pagination (PageNumber, PageSize)
- Sorting (by FullName, Email, CreatedAt, PhoneNumber)
- Optional search by name/email/username (via SearchTerm)

Returns paginated result with metadata (total count, pages, hasPrevious/hasNext).

403.description: Forbidden – user is not PlatformAdmin or InstitutionAdmin

404.description: Not found – no supervisors or no institution linked (for InstitutionAdmin)

post.summary:
Create a new Supervisor account for the institution of the logged-in InstitutionAdmin.
The InstitutionAdmin must be authenticated to perform this action. 
On success, a new AppUser of type Supervisor is created, assigned the Supervisor role, 
linked to the institution, and login credentials are sent via email.

201.description: Supervisor account created successfully. Login credentials sent via email.

400.description: Request failed (email already exists, invalid data, or failed role assignment).

404.description: InstitutionAdmin or linked institution not found.

get.summary: Returns all levels ordered by their progression order.

post.summary: Creates a new progression level. Order must be unique.

get.summary: Returns a single level by ID.

put.summary: Updates an existing level. All fields are optional.

delete.summary: Soft deletes a level. Fails if any children are currently assigned to it.

get.summary: Returns all notifications for the authenticated user, newest first.
Returns the count of unread notifications for the authenticated user.

patch.summary: Marks a single notification as read.
Marks all notifications for the authenticated user as read.

post.summary: Assign a task template to your child
post.description:
Parent selects a task from the platform and assigns it to their child.
Optional DueDate (if not provided, no deadline).

400.description: Invalid request or task already assigned

get.summary: Gets all tasks assigned by the parent to their child(ren), with optional filters
get.description:
- Filter by status (Pending, InProgress(Child click on start), ReviewRequested, Completed, Rejected)
- Search by task title
- Pagination and sorting supported
- If no childId provided, returns tasks for all linked children

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Optional: Filter by specific status (null = all statuses)

get.summary: Gets detailed view of a specific child task assigned by the parent
get.description:
Returns all necessary information for the parent to review and decide (accept/reject):
- Task details (title, description, points, type)
- Status and dates
- Child's note (ChildNote)
- Uploaded evidence (AnswerMediaUrl)
- Previous acceptance/rejection info (if found)

PlatformAdmin can use a separate endpoint if needed (full internal details).

post.summary: Parent reviews a child task (approve or reject)
post.description:
- Approve → task becomes Completed and child gets points
- Reject → task becomes Rejected and parent must provide reason

404.description: Task not found or not eligible for review

get.summary:
Global leaderboard. Accessible by Child and Parent.
Parent sees their child's rank automatically.

Institution leaderboard. Accessible by Child and Parent.
Parent sees their child's rank automatically.

post.summary:
Creates a new reward for the parent's child.
Reward includes target points, description, image,
and stays inactive until manually assigned to the child.

get.summary:
Retrieves all rewards created by the current parent.
Includes assigned and unassigned rewards.

delete.summary:
Deletes an existing reward created by the parent.
Only rewards owned by the current parent can be removed.

put.summary:
Assigns a reward to the child.
Triggered when the parent decides to give the reward
after the child reaches the target milestone.

get.summary:
Retrieves all rewards given to the current child by their parent.
Only shows rewards with status = Given.

Gets comprehensive statistics.
Accessible by Child and Parent — Parent sees their child's stats automatically.

Retrieves all active weekly adventures assigned to classes supervised by the current supervisor.
Returns adventure details including class info, total children count,
and number of submitted tasks pending review.

Retrieves child task submissions for a specific weekly adventure.
Supports optional filtering by task status (Pending, Completed, Missed, etc.)
and pagination for large result sets.
Used by supervisors to review submitted child tasks.

put.summary:
Reviews a submitted child adventure task.
Supervisor can approve or reject the task submission.

If approved:
- Task status becomes Completed
- Child earns stars and points
- Adventure progress is updated
- Completion bonus may be awarded automatically

If rejected:
- Task status returns to Pending
- Submitted evidence is removed
- Child can resubmit the task

get.summary:
Retrieves all children in a specific class with their progress summary
for a given weekly adventure.

Includes:
- Total tasks
- Submitted tasks count
- Completed tasks count
- Earned stars
- Earned points
- Adventure completion status

Retrieves the full adventure history for a specific child
within a weekly adventure.

Includes:
- Progress summary
- Completed, pending, and missed tasks
- Earned points and stars
- Detailed task history with submission evidence and review status

Retrieves all classes assigned to the current supervisor
with children count and active adventures count.

post.summary: Create a Voice Question Task
post.description:
**Voice Question** – Child records a voice answer. Validated by AI or manual review.
            
### Example Request
```json
{
  "titleAr": "اقرأ سورة الفاتحة",
  "titleEn": "Recite Surah Al-Fatihah",
  "descriptionAr": "قراءة صوتية",
  "descriptionEn": "Voice recitation",
  "iconFile": [file],
  "taskImageFile": [file],
  "subCategoryId": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "difficulty": "Hard",
  "basePoints": 50,
  "questionText": "اقرأ سورة الفاتحة بصوتك",
  "expectedCorrectAnswer": "الفاتحة",
  "voicePrompt": "Please start recording now",
  "maxVoiceAttempts": 3,
  "maxVoiceDurationSeconds": 30,
}
```

post.summary: Create an Evidence Submission Task
post.description:
**Evidence Submission** – Child uploads photo/video proof. Reviewed by Parent, Platform Admin, or AI.
            
### Example Request
```json
{
  "titleAr": "نظف غرفتك",
  "titleEn": "Clean your room",
  "descriptionAr": "التقط صورة بعد التنظيف",
  "descriptionEn": "Take a photo after cleaning",
  "iconFile": [file],
  "taskImageFile": [file],
  "subCategoryId": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "difficulty": "Medium",
  "basePoints": 30,
  "instructionsText": "التقط صورة واضحة لغرفتك بعد التنظيف",
  "evidenceType": "Image",
  "reviewBy": "Parent"
}
```
            
**EvidenceType:** Image, Video  
**ReviewBy:** Parent, PlatformAdmin, AI

get.summary: Get task template by ID and Type

Bearer.description: Put **_ONLY_** your JWT Bearer token on textbox below!
